sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108754" key="u(pomarmai/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπομαρμαίρω</orth>, <sense id="n108754.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gleam under,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.70</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi lg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕπο μαρμ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
